title: AI, Work, and Your Career
modules: Which Jobs AI Is Changing Now
Tasks Versus Jobs: A Key Distinction
Designing a Career for the AI Era
synopsis: This course moves beyond fear and hype to give workers, students, and managers a realistic picture of how AI is reshaping labor markets and what individuals can do about it. Learners will leave with practical strategies and a clearer sense of the structural forces at play.
rationale: With a demand score of 6/10 and a corpus similarity of 0.61 to 'What AI Actually Does to Jobs', there is space for a more holistic, action-oriented course that covers economic policy, career strategy, and collective responses rather than impact description alone.
nearest_existing: What AI Actually Does to Jobs
